title: Post-Training Recipe, More Than Model Family, Shapes Multi-Agent LLM Conversational Behavior
abstract: arXiv:2606.20632v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Multi-LLM systems use multiple language models to deliberate, judge each other's outputs, or coordinate as agents. Their value depends on the models producing measurably different conversational behaviors when given the same input. Prior offline studies recommend drawing one model per family for behavioral diversity, because LLMs prefer outputs from their own family when rating one another in isolation. Whether the same family label predicts behavior in interactive multi-LLM systems, the setting that real deployed systems use, has not been tested. We study this with a 940,000-chain 11-checkpoint corpus and a 1.6M-chain same-base Llama factorial. On our validated headline metric, hedging, a reasoning-distilled Llama checkpoint shifts by 18% depending on which same-base partner it replies to, more than any cross-family hedging gap in the controlled subset. Qwen, closed-API, and runtime checks suggest the pattern is not isolated,

Title: Post-Training Recipe, More Than Model Family, Shapes Multi-Agent LLM Conversational Behavior
Abstract: arXiv:2606.20632v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Multi-LLM systems use multiple language models to deliberate, judge each other's outputs, or coordinate as agents. Prior offline studies recommend drawing one model per family for behavioral diversity, because LLMs prefer outputs from their own family when rating one another in isolation. Qwen, closed-API, and runtime checks suggest the pattern is not isolated,
translated_title: 训练后配方，而非模型家族，塑造多智能体大语言模型的对话行为
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.20632v2 公告类型：替换-交叉 摘要：多LLM系统使用多个语言模型进行深思熟虑、评判彼此输出或作为智能体进行协调。它们的价值取决于模型在给定相同输入时能否产生可测量的不同对话行为。先前的离线研究建议从每个模型家族中选取一个模型以实现行为多样性，因为当LLM在隔离状态下相互评分时，它们更偏好自己家族的输出。然而，家族标签是否能在交互式多LLM系统（实际部署系统所使用的设置）中预测行为，尚未得到验证。我们通过一个包含94万条链、11个检查点的语料库和一个包含160万条链、基于相同基座的Llama因子设计来研究这一问题。在我们验证过的标题指标“规避性”上，一个经过推理蒸馏的Llama检查点根据其回应的相同基座伙伴不同，其规避性变化达18%，超过受控子集中任何跨家族规避性差异。Qwen、封闭API和运行时检查表明，这一模式并非孤立现象。
tldr: 研究发现，在交互式多智能体LLM系统中，训练后的配方（如推理蒸馏）对模型对话行为的影响远大于模型家族标签，且模型行为会因回应的伙伴不同而发生显著变化。
en_tdlr: The study finds that in interactive multi-agent LLM systems, post-training recipes (such as reasoning distillation) influence conversational behavior far more than model family labels, and model behavior shifts significantly depending on which partner it responds to.
